message.content:
@startuml
title Create/update table from CLI

actor "User" as User
participant "CLI" as CLI
participant "Model Spec" as ModelSpec
participant "Database Spec" as DBSpec
database "Database" as DB

User -> CLI : $>gaa update model
activate CLI
DBSpec -> CLI : Read database spec file
ModelSpec -> CLI : Read model spec file
CLI -> DB : Create or update table
deactivate CLI

@enduml
